---
title: "Setup – Practical 3 Tools"
subtitle: "structure · CLUMPP · structureHarvester"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
---

This notebook installs the shared local tools needed for **Practical 3** and
activates them for the current R session.

It covers:

- `structure`
- `CLUMPP`
- `structureHarvester`

Run the second chunk once. Re-running it is safe.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, comment = "")

find_repo_root <- function(start = getwd()) {
  path <- normalizePath(start, mustWork = TRUE)
  for (i in seq_len(10)) {
    if (file.exists(file.path(path, "setup", "setup_practical3_tools.sh"))) {
      return(path)
    }
    parent <- dirname(path)
    if (parent == path) break
    path <- parent
  }
  "/home/rstudio/work/Evolutionary-Genomics-UNIFR-2026-SBL.20034"
}

repo_root <- find_repo_root()
tools_dir <- file.path(repo_root, "tools")
bin_dir   <- file.path(tools_dir, "bin")
env3_dir  <- file.path(tools_dir, "env3")
installer <- file.path(repo_root, "setup", "setup_practical3_tools.sh")

cat("repo_root :", repo_root, "\n")
cat("tools_dir :", tools_dir, "\n")
cat("installer :", installer, "\n")
stopifnot("Installer script not found – check repo_root above" = file.exists(installer))
```

```{r install-and-activate, eval=FALSE}
stopifnot(file.exists(installer))
ret <- system2("bash", installer)
if (ret != 0L) stop("Installer exited with code ", ret, ". Check the output above.")

Sys.setenv(
  PATH = paste(bin_dir,
               file.path(env3_dir, "bin"),
               Sys.getenv("PATH"),
               sep = ":"),
  LD_LIBRARY_PATH = paste(file.path(env3_dir, "lib"),
                          Sys.getenv("LD_LIBRARY_PATH"),
                          sep = ":")
)

tools_to_check <- c("structure", "CLUMPP", "structureHarvester")

cat("--- Tool locations ---\n")
for (t in tools_to_check) {
  path <- Sys.which(t)
  if (nchar(path) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("  %-25s  %s\n", t, path))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("  %-25s  NOT FOUND\n", t))
  }
}

cat("\n--- structure (first line of help) ---\n")
system("structure --help 2>&1 | head -3")

cat("\n--- CLUMPP ---\n")
system("CLUMPP --help 2>&1 | head -3")

cat("\n--- structureHarvester ---\n")
system("structureHarvester --help 2>&1 | head -5")

cat("\n--- tools/bin contents ---\n")
cat(paste(sort(list.files(bin_dir)), collapse = "\n"), "\n")
```
